central_essence.title: La marca tiene una base aprovechable; el mayor valor esta en convertir senales en sistema.

atmosphere: Favor cinematic composition: focus, rhythm, silence, contrast, and intentional framing.
core_essence: La marca tiene una base aprovechable; el mayor valor esta en convertir senales en sistema.

color_meanings.meaning: Use for emotional emphasis and signature moments.
Use as a premium base for contrast and depth.

cinematic_language: Favor cinematic composition: focus, rhythm, silence, contrast, and intentional framing.
composition_rules: One clear focal point per piece.
Use negative space to increase perceived value.
Use contrast to guide attention and create authority.

official_elements.name: Percepcion premium
official_elements.meaning: Elevar prueba visual, lenguaje, ritmo de venta y empaque de oferta para justificar mayor valor percibido.

official_elements.name: Coherencia visual
official_elements.meaning: Crear un sistema visual con reglas de color, composicion, fotografia, textura y jerarquia.

official_visual_elements.name: Paisaje / contexto
official_visual_elements.meaning: Ubicar la marca en un mundo reconocible.

motion_system: Text rhythm synced to key ideas

typography.title: Editorial display sans
typography.usage: Use contrast between concise titles and calm explanatory text.

instagram_direction: Lead with one idea per post
reels_rules: Primer frame con tension o deseo.
Texto breve con una sola idea.
Cierre con promesa o accion clara.

symbolic_elements.name: Signature accent
symbolic_elements.meaning: Use color as an emotional signal, not decoration.

symbolic_elements.name: Controlled space
symbolic_elements.meaning: Build visual authority with hierarchy, negative space, contrast, and repeatable codes.

brand_soul: A system that makes the brand feel recognizable before it is explained.
soul_statement: La marca debe sentirse antes de leerse: una experiencia clara, emocional y recordable.

pillars.name: Autoridad
pillars.description: Demostrar criterio, metodo y dominio de la categoria.

pillars.name: Deseo
pillars.description: Convertir el destino o servicio en una experiencia deseable, no solo en itinerario.

pillars.name: Prueba
pillars.description: Reducir incertidumbre con evidencia, casos, testimonios y proceso.

pillars.name: Conversion
pillars.description: Guiar al publico hacia consulta, reserva, compra o diagnostico.

final_objective: Create a visual world that can guide posts, reels, proposals, and client-facing assets.
footer_claim: Designed to make the brand easier to feel, trust, remember, and choose.
